CONTENT.Club career: Keitel joined SC Freiburg in 2010 from SV Breisach. On 29 February 2020, he made his professional debut in the Bundesliga in a 1–0 league defeat away to Borussia Dortmund. He came on as a substitute at halftime for the injured Janik Haberer. In April 2020, he signed his first professional contract.On 21 May 2024, VfB Stuttgart announced the signing of Keitel on a free transfer for the 2024–25 season. Keitel signed a contract until 2028.

SUMMARY: Yannik Keitel (born 15 February 2000) is a German professional footballer who plays as a central or defensive midfielder for Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart. He has represented Germany internationally at several youth levels.
